reviews.title: Quality Product
reviews.body: These trim coarse beard hairs easily. It's easy to adjust for length and will trim very close to the skin without irritation. Also holds a charge for quite awhile.

reviews.title: First Trim and I'm Amazed
reviews.body: Coming from a Philips Norelco 5000 series. Tried Panasonic but build quality was cheap and adjustable cuts a struggle. Braun offer included multiple attachments, adjustable, and even a razor. Feels solid, much better build than Panasonic.
